runners.formComment: Found the going tougher last start when third over 400m at Gawler. That followed a win two back in 19.87 beating Cabao Nickel over 342m at this track. Doesn't profile as a likely winner.

runners.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in her races, The latest effort was a one length fourth over 530m at Murray Bridge. Not keen this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in her races, The latest effort was a one length fourth over 530m at Murray Bridge. Not keen this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked first turn; Raced wide back straight.
Went up with lids; Checked turn into back straight.

runners.formComment: Strong performance to win by 2 lengths at this track over 530m (30.96) beating Stormy Day in Invitation on April 9. Looks well placed and can measure up again.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Has finished fourth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 3 lengths behind Time To Fire over 595m. Capable of a good showing.

runners.formComment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest finishing third (31.27) at this track. Jumps from a wide draw. One of the better hopes.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest finishing third (31.27) at this track. Jumps from a wide draw. One of the better hopes.

runners.formComment: Looks close to another win after his success on March 30 at this track over 342m. Last start was second over 530m in 31.10, behind Regal Barry. In the money last time and looks well placed to go one better.
